limitations: The target still shares the benchmark prior mean; higher RD reduces but does not eliminate circularity.
The all-panel cohort contains only 3 model-line families and all 12 configurations are GPT-5.6 variants.
Continuation CPL uses depth-10 scoring after seeded-random replies and is treated as noisy evidence, not a standardized game-strength measure.
No learned candidate may change production from this analysis.
